title: alnus viridis f. glabrata
intro: Alnus viridis f. glabrata, also known as the Glabrous Green Alder, is a variant of the Green Alder plant (Alnus viridis) characterized by its smooth leaves and stems. Traditionally, the Alnus viridis f. glabrata plant has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are believed to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Alnus viridis f. glabrata include its potential to support the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
